Container.Name: filearr-meilisearch
Container.Overview:
Meilisearch for filearr — typo-tolerant instant-search engine. The index is a DISPOSABLE projection: it can always be rebuilt from Postgres via filearr's rebuild task, so no backup is strictly required. Pinned to v1.48.3 (includes fixes for CVE-2026-57823/57824 — do not run older 1.48.x/1.47.0 or floating 'latest').
Install before the filearr container. Requires the user-defined Docker network 'filearr': docker network create filearr

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Index data. Keep on cache/appdata (fast pool) — search latency depends on it.

Config.Name: MEILI_MASTER_KEY
Config.Description: Master key (16+ chars) — must match FILEARR_MEILI_MASTER_KEY in filearr and filearr-worker

Config.Name: MEILI_ENV
Config.Description: production hides the built-in preview UI; requires master key

Config.Name: Port (optional)
Config.Description: Only map for direct debugging of the search engine. Leave empty otherwise.
